title: Miraculous Miracles
description: A mod that adds the Miraculous from the show Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir.
body:
# Miraculous Miracles

A mod that adds the magical jewels, "miraculous" from the show Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir.
Each miraculous allows you to gain a special power, as well as strong armor.

To active it's power, right click with your miraculous in your hand. This action will release the kwami, and now to transform right click it.
After detransforming, your kwami must be fed. The kwami of the bee eats flowers and honey, while the kwami of the turtle eats sea grass or kelp.

The miraculous currently cannot be crafted in survival, however recipes are planned for the stable release.

Documentation is provided in-game by installing the optional dependency Patchouli.
